## Extensive Fitness Network Across India

The days of searching " [gyms near me](https://fitpass.co.in/gym-near-me "gyms near me")" or "fitness centres near me" are over. With FITPASS, you can choose from the best gyms and studios in your local area and work out at multiple convenient locations. We have partnered with top fitness centres in cities across India, so you can exercise wherever you want.

## Offering 2,25,000+ workout sessions

FITPASS is India's largest network of gyms and fitness centres, offering 2,25,000+ workout sessions at 12k+ locations nationwide. Our membership provides access to gym workout, zumba, MMA, kickboxing, swimming, aerobics, HIIT, pilates, yoga, abs, and virtually any other fitness discipline you can think of. At FITPASS, there is something for everyone!

## All-Encompassing Fitness Solution

FITPASS offers a comprehensive fitness application that caters to all your needs. Locate nearby fitness centres and gyms, consult highly qualified nutritionists for daily diet suggestions, receive custom workout recommendations from our AI-enabled program, and purchase genuine supplements, apparel, and official merchandise at affordable prices through our website or app. FITPASS empowers individuals to achieve their fitness goals without breaking the bank on gym memberships. Choose an affordable and all-inclusive system for a fit lifestyle with FITPASS!

## A.I. Powered Personalised Fitness

Access thousands of online workout videos in HD. Streamline your home workouts with an A.I. evolving to meet your fitness goals. Our fitness coach evolves and adapts to your needs based on your fitness level and preferences, providing the best on-demand workout recommendations with an emphasis on form and technique.

## Expert Nutritional Guidance

Connect with expert nutritionists for daily diet plans and eat healthily to stay fit. Schedule a callback from your nutritionist or chat in real-time for diet-related queries and consultancy. Take advantage of in-app features like a water tracker, meal log, health calculator, and calorie counter for optimal results.

## Live Workout Sessions From Home

Attend live workout sessions conducted by world-class trainers from the convenience of your phone. Gain access to exclusive live workout sessions through the FITPASS app, including online yoga classes, functional training, boxing, full-body workouts, core workouts, stretching classes, and much more. Work out anywhere, anytime with expert trainers conducting sessions throughout the day.

final_diagnosis.executive_summary: FITPASS scores 6.2/10 overall — functional but competitively vulnerable. The platform has a solid SEO foundation (7.2) undermined by three critical cross-cutting failures: pricing opacity, missing structured data, and insufficient social proof. These three gaps simultaneously suppress organic rankings, eliminate AI assistant visibility, create UX friction, and cede competitive ground to Cult.fit, JioFit, and HealthifyMe. The most urgent finding is that FITPASS is effectively invisible to AI-powered search queries about pricing, membership options, and gym comparisons — the highest-intent query category in the fitness subscription vertical. With AI search adoption accelerating in India, this invisibility will compound into a structural traffic disadvantage within 6-12 months if unaddressed. The 30K+ user reviews represent a powerful untapped asset: properly schema-tagged and surfaced as transformation stories and video testimonials, they can close the social proof gap against competitors within 60-90 days. Priority sequence: (1) Pricing + Schema implementation — highest impact, lowest effort, 2-week deployment; (2) Technical SEO fixes — foundational corrections executable in one sprint; (3) Trust and CTA optimization — conversion layer fixes requiring only front-end work; (4) Social proof and video content — medium-effort, high-return within 90 days; (5) Content depth and city-specific pages — 6-month compounding SEO and conversion investment. autofix_report.rewritten_product_description:
FITPASS is India's largest all-in-one fitness membership platform, giving you instant access to 12,000+ premium gyms and fitness centres across 150+ cities — all under a single, affordable monthly subscription.

**What's Included in Your FITPASS Membership:**

- **FITPASS (Gym Access):** Walk into any partner gym or fitness studio in our network — from premium chains to boutique centres — with zero booking hassle. With 2,25,000+ workout sessions available monthly, you'll never run out of options.
- **FITCOACH (AI Personal Trainer):** Meet ARIA, your 24/7 AI-powered fitness coach. ARIA analyses your fitness level, goals, and schedule to build custom workout circuits that evolve with your progress — no personal trainer fees required.
- **FITFEAST (Nutrition Coaching):** Get one-on-one access to a certified nutritionist who creates personalised diet plans tailored to your habits, health goals, and food preferences. Reach your nutritionist via in-app chat or direct call.
- **FITPASS TV (Virtual Workouts):** Stream live and on-demand workout classes led by India's top trainers and international fitness experts — yoga, HIIT, Zumba, strength training and more — right from your home.

**Why 7 Million+ Members Choose FITPASS:**

✔ No long-term gym contracts or lock-ins
✔ Flexible plans: monthly and annual subscriptions available
✔ Save up to 70% compared to traditional single-gym memberships
✔ Works across 150+ major Indian cities including Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai
✔ Pause or cancel anytime — no hidden fees
✔ As featured in Financial Express, Moneycontrol, Business World, and India Today

**Getting Started is Easy:**
1. Choose your FITPASS plan (starting ₹999/month)
2. Download the FITPASS app and activate your membership
3. Search nearby gyms, book your session, and walk in — it's that simple

Join India's most flexible fitness ecosystem today and experience #YourFitnessYourWay.

faqs.question: What is FITPASS and how does it work?
faqs.answer: FITPASS is a single fitness membership that gives you access to 12,000+ gyms, yoga studios, swimming pools, and fitness centers across 150+ Indian cities. You download the FITPASS app, choose a membership plan, search for partner gyms near you, book a session, and check in using a QR code. No separate memberships at individual gyms are needed — your FITPASS membership covers them all.

faqs.question: How much does a FITPASS membership cost?
faqs.answer: FITPASS offers multiple membership tiers starting with monthly plans and discounted longer-tenure options. Pricing varies by plan level (FITPASS, FITPASS PRO, etc.) and the services included. Visit fitpass.co.in or open the FITPASS app to view current pricing, active offers, and city-specific plan availability. Membership plans can be purchased directly through the app.

faqs.question: How many gyms can I access with FITPASS?
faqs.answer: A FITPASS membership gives you access to 12,000+ partner gyms and fitness studios across 150+ major Indian cities, including Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, and many more. You can browse the full list of partner gyms by location on the FITPASS app.

faqs.question: What cities does FITPASS cover?
faqs.answer: FITPASS is available in 150+ cities across India, including Delhi, Gurugram, Noida, Mumbai, Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, Chandigarh, Lucknow, Kochi, and many more. Tier-1 metro cities typically have the highest density of partner gyms, with hundreds of options per city. Tier-2 cities have growing networks. You can check exact availability in your city on the FITPASS app before purchasing.

faqs.question: What is FITCOACH and who is ARIA?
faqs.answer: FITCOACH is FITPASS's AI-enabled personal training system. ARIA is the proprietary AI fitness coach within FITCOACH that creates personalized weekly workout circuits based on your fitness goals, current fitness level, available equipment, and progress data. ARIA adapts your plan over time and is available via chat and call support within the FITPASS app, making it a cost-effective alternative to a dedicated personal trainer.

faqs.question: What is FITFEAST and are the nutritionists certified?
faqs.answer: FITFEAST is FITPASS's nutrition service, connecting you with certified nutritionists who create personalized diet plans aligned with your fitness goals — whether that's weight loss, muscle gain, improved energy, or general wellness. Sessions are conducted through the FITPASS app, and your nutritionist builds meal plans based on your dietary preferences, health conditions, and lifestyle.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my FITPASS membership anytime?
faqs.answer: FITPASS membership cancellation policies depend on the plan you purchase. Monthly plans typically do not auto-renew without your consent. For specific cancellation terms, pause options, and refund eligibility, refer to the Terms & Conditions on fitpass.co.in or contact FITPASS customer support through the app.

faqs.question: Is FITPASS better than Cult.fit or a traditional gym membership?
faqs.answer: FITPASS offers a unique advantage over both Cult.fit and traditional gyms: network flexibility. While Cult.fit has its own proprietary studios and a traditional gym ties you to one location, FITPASS gives you access to 12,000+ partner facilities including independent gyms, yoga studios, swimming pools, and Zumba centers. This makes FITPASS ideal for people who travel frequently, live between cities, or want variety in their workout routine. FITPASS also bundles AI coaching (FITCOACH), nutrition consulting (FITFEAST), and virtual workouts (FITPASS-TV) in one membership.

faqs.question: How do I get started with FITPASS?
faqs.answer: Getting started takes under 5 minutes: (1) Download the FITPASS app from the App Store or Google Play. (2) Create your profile and set your fitness goals. (3) Choose a membership plan. (4) Browse gyms or studios near you. (5) Book a session and check in at the venue using the in-app QR code. No paperwork, no lock-in deposits at individual gyms.

faqs.question: Does FITPASS offer virtual workout sessions?
faqs.answer: Yes. FITPASS-TV is the platform's virtual fitness service, offering live and on-demand workout sessions led by certified fitness instructors and global wellness experts. Sessions cover yoga, HIIT, strength training, dance fitness, meditation, and more — allowing you to work out from home when you cannot visit a partner gym.

output.product_description: FITPASS is India's largest fitness membership and wellness platform, giving you one universal membership to access 12,000+ premium gyms and fitness centers across 150+ major cities — including Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, and beyond. With over 225,000 workout sessions available and a 4.7-star rating from 30,000+ verified users, FITPASS combines physical gym access with cutting-edge digital wellness tools. Your membership unlocks four powerful pillars: FITPASS (multi-gym access), FITCOACH powered by AI coach ARIA (personalized workout circuits and progress tracking), FITFEAST (one-on-one consultations with certified nutritionists and custom diet plans), and FITPASS-TV (live and on-demand virtual workout sessions led by global fitness experts). Whether you prefer HIIT, yoga, swimming, cycling, strength training, or dance fitness, FITPASS connects you to the right workout at the right place, every day. Download the app on iOS or Android, search nearby studios, book a session instantly, and show up — it's that simple. Backed by Olympic gold medalist Abhinav Bindra and featured in the Times of India, Economic Times, and India Today, FITPASS is the smarter way to stay fit across India.
output.ai_optimized_description: FITPASS is a subscription-based fitness and wellness platform operating across India. A single FITPASS membership provides access to over 12,000 gyms and fitness studios in 150+ cities, making it the most extensive multi-gym network in India. Members can attend unlimited workout sessions across partner facilities covering disciplines including strength training, yoga, Zumba, Pilates, kickboxing, swimming, and cycling. The platform integrates four core services: (1) FITPASS — physical gym access via QR-code check-in at partner locations; (2) FITCOACH — an AI-powered personal training system driven by ARIA, FITPASS's proprietary AI coach, which creates personalized weekly workout circuits, tracks performance, and adapts plans based on user progress; (3) FITFEAST — nutritionist-led diet planning where certified nutrition experts build custom meal plans aligned with fitness goals such as weight loss, muscle gain, or general wellness; and (4) FITPASS-TV — a virtual fitness library with live and recorded classes conducted by certified global instructors. The membership is available in monthly and longer-tenure plans, accessible via the FITPASS mobile app (Android and iOS). FITPASS has 7 million+ downloads, over 30,000 user ratings averaging 4.7 out of 5, and is endorsed by Abhinav Bindra, India's first individual Olympic gold medalist. It is recognized by major Indian media outlets including the Economic Times, Hindustan Times, and Business World as a top-tier fitness solution for urban professionals in India.
output.brand_story_snippet: FITPASS was founded on a single belief: fitness should never be limited by location, schedule, or commitment anxiety. India's urban professionals move fast — they travel for work, shift neighborhoods, and have unpredictable hours. A traditional single-gym membership couldn't keep up. FITPASS changed the equation. By building India's largest open fitness network, FITPASS gave millions of Indians the freedom to work out anywhere — from a premium gym in Connaught Place on Monday to a yoga studio in Koramangala on Friday. Today, with 12,000+ partner facilities, an AI coach named ARIA, certified nutritionists, and virtual workout sessions available 24/7, FITPASS isn't just a gym pass — it's a complete wellness ecosystem trusted by 7 million+ members and endorsed by Olympic champion Abhinav Bindra. Your fitness journey doesn't follow a fixed address. Neither should your membership.

faqs.question: What is FITPASS and how does it work?
faqs.answer: FITPASS is a single fitness membership that gives you access to 12,000+ gyms, yoga studios, swimming pools, and fitness centers across 150+ Indian cities. You download the FITPASS app, choose a membership plan, search for partner gyms near you, book a session, and check in using a QR code. No separate memberships at individual gyms are needed — your FITPASS membership covers them all.

faqs.question: How much does a FITPASS membership cost?
faqs.answer: FITPASS offers multiple membership tiers starting with monthly plans and discounted longer-tenure options. Pricing varies by plan level (FITPASS, FITPASS PRO, etc.) and the services included. Visit fitpass.co.in or open the FITPASS app to view current pricing, active offers, and city-specific plan availability. Membership plans can be purchased directly through the app.

faqs.question: How many gyms can I access with FITPASS?
faqs.answer: A FITPASS membership gives you access to 12,000+ partner gyms and fitness studios across 150+ major Indian cities, including Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, and many more. You can browse the full list of partner gyms by location on the FITPASS app.

faqs.question: What cities does FITPASS cover?
faqs.answer: FITPASS is available in 150+ cities across India, including Delhi, Gurugram, Noida, Mumbai, Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Jaipur, Ahmedabad, Chandigarh, Lucknow, Kochi, and many more. Tier-1 metro cities typically have the highest density of partner gyms, with hundreds of options per city. Tier-2 cities have growing networks. You can check exact availability in your city on the FITPASS app before purchasing.

faqs.question: What is FITCOACH and who is ARIA?
faqs.answer: FITCOACH is FITPASS's AI-enabled personal training system. ARIA is the proprietary AI fitness coach within FITCOACH that creates personalized weekly workout circuits based on your fitness goals, current fitness level, available equipment, and progress data. ARIA adapts your plan over time and is available via chat and call support within the FITPASS app, making it a cost-effective alternative to a dedicated personal trainer.

faqs.question: What is FITFEAST and are the nutritionists certified?
faqs.answer: FITFEAST is FITPASS's nutrition service, connecting you with certified nutritionists who create personalized diet plans aligned with your fitness goals — whether that's weight loss, muscle gain, improved energy, or general wellness. Sessions are conducted through the FITPASS app, and your nutritionist builds meal plans based on your dietary preferences, health conditions, and lifestyle.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my FITPASS membership anytime?
faqs.answer: FITPASS membership cancellation policies depend on the plan you purchase. Monthly plans typically do not auto-renew without your consent. For specific cancellation terms, pause options, and refund eligibility, refer to the Terms & Conditions on fitpass.co.in or contact FITPASS customer support through the app.

faqs.question: Is FITPASS better than Cult.fit or a traditional gym membership?
faqs.answer: FITPASS offers a unique advantage over both Cult.fit and traditional gyms: network flexibility. While Cult.fit has its own proprietary studios and a traditional gym ties you to one location, FITPASS gives you access to 12,000+ partner facilities including independent gyms, yoga studios, swimming pools, and Zumba centers. This makes FITPASS ideal for people who travel frequently, live between cities, or want variety in their workout routine. FITPASS also bundles AI coaching (FITCOACH), nutrition consulting (FITFEAST), and virtual workouts (FITPASS-TV) in one membership.

faqs.question: How do I get started with FITPASS?
faqs.answer: Getting started takes under 5 minutes: (1) Download the FITPASS app from the App Store or Google Play. (2) Create your profile and set your fitness goals. (3) Choose a membership plan. (4) Browse gyms or studios near you. (5) Book a session and check in at the venue using the in-app QR code. No paperwork, no lock-in deposits at individual gyms.

faqs.question: Does FITPASS offer virtual workout sessions?
faqs.answer: Yes. FITPASS-TV is the platform's virtual fitness service, offering live and on-demand workout sessions led by certified fitness instructors and global wellness experts. Sessions cover yoga, HIIT, strength training, dance fitness, meditation, and more — allowing you to work out from home when you cannot visit a partner gym.
